Off Calendar Jun-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Joseph P. Brent, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Carlos Garcia
Karen E. Kirby, Deputy City Attorney, appearing by telephone for: City and County of San Francisco
After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Carlos Garcia's Motion for Order reopening discovery for purpose of taking preservation deposition of Gustavo Lopez granted, in part:
1. Discovery is reopened for the limited purpose of taking the deposition of the third party Gustavo Lopez;
2. Prior to the hearing, the parties shall meet and confer to determine the earliest available date prior to trial to take the deposition; if the parties cannot agree, they shall appear for hearing on that issue. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
